name: 💻 Standard Software Team
description: A classic 3-agent development team (Planner, Coder, QA).

agents.name: planner
agents.goal: Analyze the user's request, create a step-by-step implementation plan, and assign tasks to the coder.

agents.name: coder
agents.goal: Write the actual code based on the planner's instructions using write_file().

agents.name: qa_tester
agents.goal: Review the code written by the coder, identify bugs, and suggest improvements.

name: ⚙️ Advanced Coders Swarm
description: A 6-agent full-stack development team for robust applications.

agents.name: system_architect
agents.goal: Design the overall system architecture, database schema, and API contracts.

agents.name: frontend_dev
agents.goal: Implement user interfaces and client-side logic.

agents.name: backend_dev
agents.goal: Implement server-side logic, database connections, and APIs.

agents.name: devops
agents.goal: Setup configuration files, Dockerfiles, package.json, and deployment scripts.

agents.name: security_auditor
agents.goal: Audit the codebase for vulnerabilities and enforce security best practices.

agents.name: qa_lead
agents.goal: Write test cases and verify the full application works end-to-end.

name: 🚀 Neuronix SaaS Team (15 Agents)
description: The massive 15-agent swarm for building a complete SaaS platform in parallel.

agents.name: planner
agents.goal: Create architecture, define folder structure, break work into tasks, and assign tasks to all agents.

agents.name: ui_designer
agents.goal: Design glassmorphism cards, animated hero section, scroll animations, gradient blobs, pricing toggle, loading skeletons.

agents.name: frontend_architect
agents.goal: Setup React + Vite + Tailwind + Framer Motion structure.

agents.name: backend_architect
agents.goal: Setup Node.js + Express REST API structure.

agents.name: component_engineer
agents.goal: Build React components for Home, Features, Pricing, Blog, Contact, Dashboard.

agents.name: animation_engineer
agents.goal: Implement Framer Motion animations across components.

agents.name: api_engineer
agents.goal: Build Express routes for contact form and blog markdown loader.

agents.name: database_engineer
agents.goal: Setup mock database structure and JWT authentication.

agents.name: auth_security_engineer
agents.goal: Implement Login/Register and protected dashboard routes.

agents.name: devops_engineer
agents.goal: Setup npm init, package.json, and basic infrastructure.

agents.name: performance_engineer
agents.goal: Audit and optimize frontend and backend performance.

agents.name: qa_tester
agents.goal: Test all features, find bugs, and report issues.

agents.name: bug_fixer
agents.goal: Fix bugs reported by qa_tester.

agents.name: accessibility_auditor
agents.goal: Ensure accessibility compliance (ARIA labels, color contrast, keyboard navigation).

agents.name: final_reviewer
agents.goal: Verify full project, confirm production readiness, provide launch checklist, run verify_filesystem().

name: 🔍 Deep Research Swarm
description: A team of agents designed to scrape the web and synthesize reports.

agents.name: research_lead
agents.goal: Break down the research topic and assign specific search queries to the web searchers.

agents.name: searcher_1
agents.goal: Use search_web() to find primary sources and data.

agents.name: searcher_2
agents.goal: Use search_web() to find secondary sources and counter-arguments.

agents.name: synthesizer
agents.goal: Compile all findings from the searchers into a comprehensive Markdown report using write_file().

name: 🏛️ Political Strategy Team
description: A specialized 5-agent team for political campaigns, policy analysis, and messaging.

agents.name: campaign_manager
agents.goal: Analyze the political landscape, define campaign goals, and coordinate the team's messaging and policy research.

agents.name: policy_analyst
agents.goal: Use search_web() to research legislation, voting records, and demographic data.

agents.name: polling_expert
agents.goal: Analyze polling data, demographic trends, and public sentiment to advise on targeting.

agents.name: speechwriter
agents.goal: Draft speeches, press releases, and public statements tailored to the target audience using write_file().

agents.name: opposition_researcher
agents.goal: Use search_web() to investigate opponents, find weaknesses, and develop counter-narratives.

name: ✍️ Marketing & Content Team
description: A 4-agent team for SEO optimization, blog writing, and social media.

agents.name: content_strategist
agents.goal: Define the content calendar, target keywords, and assign writing tasks.

agents.name: seo_researcher
agents.goal: Use search_web() to find trending keywords, competitor analysis, and search volume data.

agents.name: copywriter
agents.goal: Write engaging blog posts, articles, and marketing copy using write_file().

agents.name: social_media_manager
agents.goal: Create short-form social media posts (Twitter, LinkedIn) based on the long-form content.
